signals.reasoning: BTC is already in a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is also already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL has already moved into flush territory, and with negative funding building I would rather wait for a clearer reset than force a trade.
COMP remains the clearest long candidate because funding is deeply negative while price is holding up, but liquidity is poor so confidence stays modest.
BLUR is too mixed and too low-liquidity to justify a serious fresh trade.
BIO is too flat and too low-liquidity to justify a fresh directional trade.
MERL is already weak and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short entry after the move.
VVV is the clearest short on this board because price is down hard while open interest is still rising, which suggests the downside move is still active.
DASH is already in a flush state and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
MET is already down hard and too low-liquidity to trust for a fresh short chase.
ZEN is already weak and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short entry after the move.
